case_title: ANA LINARES VS. ANTONIO PALAZZO INTERNATIONAL SPORTSMOTORS

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANTONIO PALAZZO, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2022 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF ANA LINARES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTONIO PALAZZO INTERNATIONAL SPORTSMOTORS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANTONIO PALAZZO, OWNER. THE COURT CLARIFIES THE TRUE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT WITH THE PARTIES TO BE INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS AND AMENDS THE NAME ON THE CASE. DEFENDANT FILING WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLESIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,241.30 FILED BY LINARES, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED OCT-06-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-12-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY LINARES, ANA INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2022 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINARES, ANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC. $1,241.30 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,271.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
